
── System Info ──

  ✓ OS: Ubuntu 24.04.1 LTS
  ✓ Kernel: 6.8.0-48-generic
  ✓ Arch: x86_64
  ✓ Running as root

── Required Tools ──

  ✓ curl: /usr/bin/curl
  ✓ jq: /usr/bin/jq
  ✓ python3: /usr/bin/python3
  ✓ openssl: /usr/bin/openssl
  ✓ systemctl: /usr/bin/systemctl
  ✓ ss: /usr/bin/ss

── NanoBK Configuration ──

  ✓ Config directory: /etc/nanobk
  ✓ Config env: /etc/nanobk/config.env
  ✓ Config env permissions: 600 (secure)

── Cloudflare Admin Config ──

  ✓ CF admin env: /root/.nanok-cf-admin.env
  ✓ ADMIN_TOKEN is set
  ✓ ADMIN_UPDATE_URL is set
  token=TEST_TOKEN_SHOULD_REDACT
  secret=TEST_SECRET_SHOULD_REDACT
  PRIVATE_KEY=TEST_PRIVATE_KEY_SHOULD_REDACT
  domain=example.invalid
  vpsIp=192.0.2.10
  url=https://example.invalid/sub/TEST_SUBSCRIPTION_PATH

── Systemd Services ──

  ✓ hysteria-server.service: active
  ✓ tuic-v5-9443.service: active
  ✓ xray-reality-8443.service: active
  ✓ xray-trojan-2443.service: active

── Port Listening ──

  ✓ HY2 :443 (udp): listening
  ✓ TUIC :9443 (udp): listening
  ✓ Reality :8443 (tcp): listening
  ✓ Trojan :2443 (tcp): listening

── Config Files ──

  ✓ HY2 config: /etc/hysteria/config.yaml
  ✓ TUIC config: /etc/proxy-stack/tuic-v5-9443/config.json
  ✓ Reality config: /etc/proxy-stack/xray-reality-8443/config.json
  ✓ Trojan config: /etc/proxy-stack/xray-trojan-2443/config.json

── Summary ──

  All checks passed!
